scripts.smoke:combined-opportunity-engine: rm -rf /tmp/swing-up-opportunity-test && npx tsc scripts/combined-opportunity-engine-smoke.ts lib/opportunity-engine/engine.ts lib/opportunity-engine/types.ts --outDir /tmp/swing-up-opportunity-test --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2022 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && node /tmp/swing-up-opportunity-test/scripts/combined-opportunity-engine-smoke.js
scripts.smoke:combined-opportunity-engine-live: rm -rf /tmp/swing-up-opportunity-live && npx tsc scripts/combined-opportunity-engine-live.ts lib/opportunity-engine/live-data.ts lib/opportunity-engine/engine.ts lib/opportunity-engine/types.ts --outDir /tmp/swing-up-opportunity-live --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2022 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --noEmit false && node /tmp/swing-up-opportunity-live/scripts/combined-opportunity-engine-live.js
